description: Concern facet (PROTOTYPE): the cofounder-altitude question the other facets don't ask — not 'is what we built good?' but 'does it add up to the goal, and are we building it sanely?' Rolls up the standing exploration-mode judgment leaves review.viability, review.use-case-completeness, review.scalability, and review.simplicity. Each leaf is milestone-aware (a finding gates only at/below the rung by which it must be fixed), so this facet turns red only when a strategic gap must be addressed at the current milestone. Wired ADVISORY under root for now (root lists it in advisoryCheckIds): it surfaces in the 'where are we, really?' narrative without blocking deploys. Promote to gating later by removing it from root's advisoryCheckIds.
